---
title: "Audio Content Dashboard"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
---
```{ojs}
//| output: false

html`
<style>
  /* Cores */
  :root {
    --bg-main: #000000;
    --bg-hover: #282828;
    --text-primary: #FFFFFF;
  }

  /* Background */
  body {
    background-color: var(--bg-main) !important;
    color: var(--text-primary) !important;
    font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  }

  /* Romover fundo branco do ojs */
  .card {
    background-color: transparent !important; /* Deixa ver o preto de trás */
    border: none !important; /* Remove bordas padrão feias */
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  /* ScrollBar */
  ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 8px; }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--bg-main); }
  ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--bg-hover); border-radius: 4px; }
  
  .dashboard-card {
    margin: 0 !important;
  }

  .navbar {
    background-color: #333 !important; /* Força o fundo preto */
    color: white !important;
  }

</style>
`
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
data = FileAttachment("dados.json").json()
```

## Column {width=35%}

### Métricas Principais
```{ojs}
// Tabela Interativa (Lista de Músicas)
viewof selection = {
  const container = html`<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; height: 85vh; overflow-y: auto; padding-right: 5px;"></div>`;
  
  container.value = data[0];

  for (const song of data) {
    const row = html`
      <div style="
        display: flex; 
        align-items: center; 
        padding: 10px; 
        background: #2b2b2b; 
        border-radius: 8px; 
        cursor: pointer; 
        color: white; 
        transition: background 0.2s;">
        
        <img src="${song.img}" style="width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 15px; object-fit: cover;">
        
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1em;">${song.Música}</div>
          <div style="opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.9em;">${song.Artista}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

    row.onclick = () => {
      for (const child of container.children) child.style.background = "#2b2b2b";
      
      row.style.background = "#1db954";
      
      container.value = song;
      container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles: true}));
    };

    container.append(row);
  }

  if(container.children[0]) container.children[0].style.background = "#1db954";

  return container;
}
```


## Column {width=65%}

```{ojs}
//| output: false
current = selection ? selection : data[0]
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
html`<iframe 
  style="border-radius:12px" 
  src=${`https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/${current.id}?utm_source=generator`} 
  width="100%" 
  height="352"
  allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" 
  loading="lazy">
</iframe>`

millisToMinutesAndSeconds = (millis) => {
  if (!millis) return "-";
  const minutes = Math.floor(millis / 60000);
  const seconds = ((millis % 60000) / 1000).toFixed(0);
  return minutes + ":" + (seconds < 10 ? '0' : '') + seconds;
}

createTag = (label, value, icon = "") => {
  return html`
    <div style="
      background: #1a1a1a; 
      padding: 8px; 
      border-radius: 6px; 
      border: 1px solid #333; 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column; 
      justify-content: center;">
      
      <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #b3b3b3; margin-bottom: 4px; text-transform: uppercase;">${label}</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 600; color: white;">
        ${icon} ${value || "-"}
      </div>
    </div>
  `
}
```

```{ojs}
html`
<div style="margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
  <h3 style="color: white; margin-bottom: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #333; padding-bottom: 10px;">
    Detalhes da Faixa
  </h3>

  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 10px;">
    
    ${createTag("Artista", current.Artista, "🎤")}
    ${createTag("Álbum", current.Album || "Single", "💿")}
    ${createTag("Duração", millisToMinutesAndSeconds(current.Duracao),"⏱")}
    ${createTag("Ano", current.Year || "N/A", "📅")}

    ${createTag("BPM", current.BPM, "🥁")}
    ${createTag("Popularidade", (current.Popularidade || 0) + "%", "🔥")}
    
    ${createTag("Energia", ((current.Energia || 0) * 100).toFixed(0) + "%", "⚡")}
    ${createTag("Dança", ((current.Danceability || 0) * 100).toFixed(0) + "%", "💃")}
    ${createTag("Felicidade", ((current.Happiness || 0) * 100).toFixed(0) + "%", "😊")}
    
  </div>
</div>
`
```
